CVE-2022-24615.title: zip4j up to v2.10.0 can throw various uncaught exceptions while p ...
CVE-2022-24615.summary: zip4j up to v2.10.0 can throw various uncaught exceptions while parsing a specially crafted ZIP file, which could result in an application crash. This could be used to mount a denial of service attack against services that use zip4j library.

CVE-2023-22899.title: Zip4j through 2.11.2, as used in Threema and other products, does ...
CVE-2023-22899.summary: Zip4j through 2.11.2, as used in Threema and other products, does not always check the MAC when decrypting a ZIP archive.
